metadata.title: Global Careers — Offshore Staffing Solutions | Save 60-80% on Talent
metadata.description: Save up to 80% on talent costs. Pre-vetted offshore professionals across technology, finance, marketing & more from 12+ countries. 6-month guarantee. A subsidiary of Arobas Personnel.
metadata.ogTitle: Global Careers — Hire Pre-Vetted Offshore Professionals & Save Up to 80%
metadata.ogDescription: Access 500+ pre-vetted professionals from 12+ countries across technology, finance, operations & more. Save 60-80% versus US salaries with our 6-month placement guarantee.

footer.tagline: Global Careers by Arobas Personnel connects US companies with pre-vetted offshore professionals from 12+ countries — saving you 60-80% on talent costs with zero compromise on quality.
footer.copyright: © {year} Global Careers, a division of Arobas Personnel. All rights reserved.
footer.madeWith: Made with precision in Orlando, FL & Montréal, QC

hero.title: Hire Elite Offshore Talent at
hero.subtitle: Pre-vetted professionals across technology, finance, marketing & more from 12+ countries. Scale your team faster, spend smarter, and get a 6-month placement guarantee.

scrollVideo.card1Desc: Only the top 3% of candidates pass our rigorous 5-step vetting process. Technical assessments, video interviews, and background checks — before you ever see a resume.
scrollVideo.card2Desc: Source talent from Colombia, Argentina, Mexico, India, Philippines, Poland, and more. English-fluent professionals ready to integrate with your US-based team.
scrollVideo.card3Desc: Save 60-80% versus US salaries without compromising quality. We handle payroll, compliance, and infrastructure — you just hire.
scrollVideo.card4Desc: Curated shortlists within 7 days. Most roles filled in under 14 business days. Urgent requests expedited on demand.
scrollVideo.card5Desc: Every placement backed by our ironclad guarantee. If your hire doesn't meet expectations, we replace them at absolutely no extra cost.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From your first call to onboarding your new hire — we handle everything in as little as 7 days.
howItWorks.step1Description: Share your role requirements, skills needed, and budget. We'll craft a talent profile and begin sourcing from our pre-vetted network across 12+ countries.
howItWorks.step2Description: Within 7 days, receive curated shortlists of pre-screened professionals — complete with skill assessments, English proficiency scores, and video interviews.
howItWorks.step3Description: Select your ideal candidate, finalize terms, and onboard seamlessly. We handle contracts, payroll, compliance, and ongoing support — backed by our 6-month guarantee.
howItWorks.vettingSubtitle: Only the top 3% of candidates make it through our rigorous screening

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing, Exceptional Value
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. No long-term contracts. Just honest pricing for world-class offshore talent.

directHire.title: Direct Hire
directHire.description: One-time placement for permanent roles. Ideal for senior positions, leadership hires, and long-term team members.

talentOnDemand.title: Talent on Demand
talentOnDemand.description: Flexible, month-to-month staffing with managed payroll, infrastructure, and performance monitoring. Scale up or down as needed.

junior.title: Junior Talent
junior.description: 1-3 years experience. Perfect for support roles and growing teams.

mid.title: Mid-Level Talent
mid.description: 3-6 years experience. Skilled professionals ready to deliver immediately.

senior.title: Senior Talent
senior.description: 6+ years experience. Expert-level contributors for critical projects.

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Custom pricing for teams of 10+ professionals. Dedicated account manager, volume discounts, and priority sourcing.

faq.a1: No. You only pay once we successfully place a candidate who meets your requirements.
faq.a2: If a placed candidate leaves or is terminated within 6 months, we replace them at no additional cost.
faq.q3: How quickly can you fill a role?
faq.a3: Most roles are filled within 7-14 business days. Urgent requests can be expedited.
faq.q4: Can I switch from Talent on Demand to Direct Hire?
faq.a4: Absolutely. We make it easy to convert contractors to permanent hires when the time is right.
faq.q5: What countries do you source from?
faq.a5: We source from 12+ countries including Colombia, Argentina, Mexico, Brazil, India, Philippines, Poland, Ukraine, Romania, Egypt, Morocco, and Tunisia.
faq.a6: We do. Our Talent on Demand model includes managed payroll, local compliance, and tax handling for every country we operate in.

calculator.title: Savings Calculator
calculator.subtitle: See exactly how much you can save by hiring offshore talent through Global Careers.
calculator.disclaimer: Salary ranges are based on market data and may vary by candidate experience and specific requirements.

roles.title: Explore Offshore Roles
roles.subtitle: Browse 50+ pre-vetted role categories across technology, finance, marketing, operations & more. Every candidate is screened, tested, and interview-ready.

servicesOverview.title: Three Ways to Hire
servicesOverview.subtitle: Choose the hiring model that fits your needs

directHire.title: Direct Hire
directHire.subtitle: Permanent placements for your most important roles
directHire.description: One-time placement fee for senior professionals, team leads, and long-term team members. We find, vet, and deliver top-tier offshore candidates — you make the final call.
features: Dedicated talent advisor throughout the process
directHire.guarantee: Every placement backed by our 6-month replacement guarantee. If the hire doesn't work out, we replace them free of charge.

talentOnDemand.title: Talent on Demand
talentOnDemand.subtitle: Flexible staffing that scales with your business
talentOnDemand.description: Access pre-vetted offshore professionals on a monthly basis. We manage payroll, infrastructure, and performance monitoring — you focus on growing your business.
features: Month-to-month flexibility — scale up or down anytime
Dedicated account manager for your team

aiRecruitment.title: AI-Powered Recruitment
aiRecruitment.subtitle: Next-generation hiring powered by artificial intelligence
aiRecruitment.description: Leverage cutting-edge AI to screen, match, and qualify candidates faster and more accurately than ever before.
aiRecruitment.advantagesSubtitle: Our AI technology transforms every stage of the hiring process
aiRecruitment.adv1Desc: Automatically analyze resumes and profiles to identify top candidates based on skills, experience, and cultural fit — reducing screening time by 70%.
aiRecruitment.adv2Desc: Our proprietary matching engine pairs your role requirements with candidate strengths, delivering 95%+ match accuracy on shortlists.
aiRecruitment.adv3Desc: AI handles timezone coordination, availability matching, and calendar management — candidates are scheduled within hours, not days.
aiRecruitment.adv4Desc: Engage candidates through natural-language voice AI for initial screening calls, qualification checks, and scheduling — 24/7, in multiple languages.
aiRecruitment.adv5Desc: Each candidate receives a data-driven qualification score based on skill assessments, experience depth, and role alignment — removing bias from the process.
aiRecruitment.adv6Desc: Leverage hiring data to predict candidate success, retention likelihood, and optimal compensation — making every hire a strategic decision.
aiRecruitment.useCasesSubtitle: How our AI transforms recruitment outcomes
aiRecruitment.useCase1Desc: Process hundreds of applications in minutes instead of weeks. AI pre-qualifies candidates so your team focuses only on top talent.
aiRecruitment.useCase2Desc: Match roles with talent across 12+ countries, considering timezone, language, and cultural compatibility alongside technical skills.
aiRecruitment.useCase3Desc: Replace gut-feel hiring with objective qualification scores and predictive analytics that reduce mis-hires by 60%.
aiRecruitment.useCase4Desc: Voice AI and chatbot engagement ensures no candidate falls through the cracks — every application gets a response within minutes.
aiRecruitment.ctaSubtitle: Join forward-thinking companies using AI to find the best offshore talent faster and smarter.

aiShowcase.title: Smarter Hiring, Powered by AI
aiShowcase.subtitle: Our AI technology screens, matches, and qualifies candidates faster — so you hire the best talent in record time.
aiShowcase.feature1Desc: Analyze hundreds of resumes in minutes with AI-powered candidate screening.
aiShowcase.feature2Desc: 95% match accuracy pairing your roles with the right professionals.
aiShowcase.feature3Desc: AI coordinates timezones and availability for seamless interview booking.
aiShowcase.feature4Desc: Data-driven scores remove bias and predict candidate success.

finalCta.title: Ready to Save 60-80% on Talent?
finalCta.subtitle: Join 200+ US companies already hiring pre-vetted offshore professionals through Global Careers.

about.title: About Global Careers
about.subtitle: A subsidiary of Arobas Personnel — connecting US companies with the world's best talent since day one.
about.story: Global Careers was born from a simple observation: US companies were overpaying for talent while brilliant professionals around the world were underemployed. As a division of Arobas Personnel, one of North America's most trusted staffing agencies, we built the infrastructure to bridge that gap — delivering pre-vetted, English-fluent professionals from 12+ countries at 60-80% savings.
about.mission: Our mission is to make world-class talent accessible to every US company, regardless of size or budget. We believe that geography should never be a barrier to finding the right person for the right role.

quality.title: Uncompromising Quality
quality.description: Only the top 3% of candidates pass our 5-step vetting process. We never sacrifice quality for speed.

transparency.title: Radical Transparency
transparency.description: No hidden fees, no surprise charges, no fine print. You see exactly what you pay for — and exactly what you save.

speed.title: Speed to Hire
speed.description: Curated shortlists within 7 days. Most roles filled in under 14 business days. Urgent requests expedited on demand.

guarantee.title: Ironclad Guarantee
guarantee.description: Every placement backed by a 6-month replacement guarantee. If the hire doesn't work out, we replace them at no extra cost.

about.teamDescription: Led by recruitment veterans with 20+ years of combined experience in international staffing, our team operates from Orlando, FL and Montréal, QC.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you're looking for and we'll get back to you within 24 hours with a tailored plan.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.message: Tell us about your hiring needs
contact.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly at hello@globalcareers.com.

booking.title: Book a Call
booking.subtitle: Schedule a free consultation with our talent advisors. No commitment, no pressure — just honest guidance on your hiring strategy.
booking.notes: Any notes or specific topics to discuss?
booking.success: Your call is booked! Check your email for confirmation and a calendar invite.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Leading US Companies
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from business leaders who scaled their teams with Global Careers.

guarantee.title: 6-Month Replacement Guarantee
guarantee.description: Every hire through Global Careers is backed by our ironclad 6-month guarantee. If your new team member doesn't meet expectations, we'll find a replacement at absolutely no additional cost. Zero risk, maximum confidence.
